title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Kiku, Kinemon, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Unknown person #7 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: White- Beard was charmed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What a story....!! How cruel of....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What happened to open?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And Roger was captivated...

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: ...by that Samurai of the Wano Country...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Our beloved Lord Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was taken to the flower capital... and executed as a criminal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What'd you SAAAA? AAAAY!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: > > don't joke with me!!! That's dirty, broch!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of this happened to the courageous Lord open...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Over 20 years ago. But...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: In our eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It was only a few months ago.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The brave warrior, Kozuki Oden's final moments...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: When I close my eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can envision it just as if it happened yesterday...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What an extraordi- nary man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's pretty impressive that you guys were able to escape safely from such a crappy situation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Yes... but at that point, no one was on our side anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In desperation, we escaped with all of our strength,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and left the execution site to head to open castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On our way there, nekomamushi and Inuarashi started to argue it out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were caught by Orochi's subordinates and we believed their lives to be forfeit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But at that point, it did not matter who died. We absolutely needed to get to open castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orochi, who orchestrated the downfall of the Kozuki clan, would surely target Lord MOMONOSUKE's life next...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...how- ever...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido anticipated our plan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the castle was set Ablaze before we could reach it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: LORD MOMO- NOSUKE AND HIS YOUNGER SISTER, LADY HIVOR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: were stuck inside of the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONO- Suke!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: lady hiyor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: lady Tok!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: ...along with their mother, Lady Kozuki Tok!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, this may sound hard to believe, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's impossible for people to travel to the past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There have always been rumours that lady Toki was born sometime in the distant past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, travelling to the future is very possible.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been traveling further and further into the future using this mysterious "time-time" ability.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And finally, I have arrived here, at the terminus of my journey.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...!! Lord open...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there- fore, this is where I shall remain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Could we stop it...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If travel- ing into the future is truly possible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then we will definitely fulfill Lord Oden's wishes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will definitely take down orochi and Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: and open up this country's borders!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm leaving momono- suke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In your care.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh... What just...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is this a dream!? Where are we!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where is the castle?? What about the fire?? and what about Lady Toki?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What about Lady Hiyori?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
